text.title: Async Multi Client Time Boxing Core Rules
text.summary: 4 testable rules every Async Multi Client Time Boxing application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Apply Async Multi Client Time Boxing only to a single instance of 'p3-technical-freelancer/Freelancer-to-SaaS transition without losing the runway'. Never batch multiple unrelated decisions through one pass.
rule.rationale: Batching turns a 1-decision artefact into a debate club. Each instance gets its own record so the rationale is traceable.

rule.statement: Every input field has a declared type and source. Free-form prose without a source citation is rejected.
rule.rationale: Untyped inputs let LLMs hallucinate plausible-but-wrong values. Typed + sourced inputs make the output falsifiable.

rule.statement: The output names a single accountable owner (handle, email, or org role). No 'team' or 'we' as owner.
rule.rationale: Plural ownership = no ownership. Future readers need a named human to chase when the artefact is stale.

rule.statement: Output carries semver-style version and last_reviewed date. Stale records (>90 days, no review) must be flagged on read.
rule.rationale: Methodology outputs decay; treating them as immutable is a defect. Versioning + review-by-date forces refresh cadence.

rule.statement: If all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If disqualifier is present, execute the full procedure from `04-procedure.xml` and commit the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
rule.rationale: Anchor for the decision tree's affirmative leaf; pairs the preconditions with the methodology's commit path.

rule.statement: If any Skip-If condition is present (one-shot, <3 instances/year, regulator override, missing owner), do NOT apply this methodology. Route to the sibling/upstream methodology named in `AGENTS.md` Related section.
rule.rationale: Anchor for the decision tree's skip leaf; prevents over-application of a heavyweight artefact when the loop conditions do not hold.
